response.overview: Eugenia, a lonely aspiring influencer, employs a social media manager, Natalie, to reinvigorate her image. As the two women spend more time together, Eugenia falls in love with the attention Natalie is paying her and Natalie falls in love with the idealised Eugenia. As their mutual attraction spirals deeper into obsession and jealousy, their relationship reaches a breaking point.
response.title: Glass Houses
